text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day, and the students have
been excitedly exchanging gifts since morning.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy! Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And ya can't have Valentine's Day without
chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So I bought a chocolate cake to thank ya for all
your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Honest, I really did buy it. But...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The thing is... that cake kinda accidentally ended
up in my stomach!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But it was downright delectable! I really want ya
to try it too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So let's go buy another one together! I might eat
the whole thing again if I go by myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Taiki Shuttle's urging, we go into town to buy
a cake together. However...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Whaddya mean they're all sold out?!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text: I'm terribly sorry. That cake was very popular...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What're we gonna do now? That was supposed to
be your present...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to buy a replacement cake, Taiki grows
disheartened.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see by her expression just how much she
wants to make me happy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I'm the only one who got to eat the
cake...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I know the rules—ya gotta give chocolate
here in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Just the thought ain't enough!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay—let's look for a different gift! You're
definitely gettin' some kinda thank-you chocolate
today!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ah, how 'bout this one? You eat it with rice, just
like curry!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Or what about this one? You mix it with rice to
make chocolate fried rice! Looks fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the rest of Valentine's Day with a Taiki
Shuttle determined to show her gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No! That ain't enough to put my mind at ease!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I got it! I'll make ya the chocolate cake myself! I
still remember how it tasted!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can see you're worried, but everything'll be just
hunky-dory! I'm a barbeque master, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head back to the academy, wondering what
barbecues have to do with baking cakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a brief wait in my office...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the holdup! Here's your chocolate cake!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sure, it came out a little black, but it's shaped
just like the cake from before. And I'm confident
about the taste!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ya know, I'm kinda glad they were sold out.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You're always workin' so hard to help me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's only fair I work hard too to show my
appreciation! Tit for tat!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aww, you're welcome! Now, go ahead and dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's thank-you gift ends up having a
little bitterness to it.
